column1: # Offline PG-GA converged operating point (the chosen point on the
# Pareto front in Figure 11).
# All values are outputs of the offline Physics-Guided Genetic
# Algorithm; they are stored here as the single source of truth for
# the "CHOSEN OPERATING POINT" star marker in Figure 11. The script
# `figures/plot_figure11_pareto_front.py` reads this file and uses
# the values for the annotation overlay.
# The T_isolated_ms and LocA_percent columns MUST match the same
# columns of the row in `figure11_pareto_front.csv` whose
# `w4_over_w2` is closest to the value below; both files are produced
# by the same GA run and must stay in lockstep.
# IMPORTANT: This file is the single source of truth for the
# Figure 11 chosen operating point. To regenerate from raw data:
# re-run the offline PG-GA (see `evaluation/Table6__CrossValidation.py`
# for the offline training harness) and overwrite this file.
Parameter
w2
w4
w4_over_w2
T_isolated_ms
LocA_percent
T_budget_ms
Loca_target_percent
